name: Marinated Broccoli and Tomato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Black olives, pitted and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the marinating mixture by combining all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Toss the broccoli and mushrooms with the marinade until evenly coated.
3. Add the cherry tomatoes to the bowl and mix gently.
4. Cover the salad and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Before serving, taste the salad and adjust seasoning if needed.
